nodeAfter: v22.22.3 installed via nvm, but node -v timed out
npmAfter: not available; npm -v timed out under Node v22.22.3
blockers: nvm is available and Node v22.22.3 was installed, but the isolated Node 22 binary did not return from node -v.
npm -v under Node v22.22.3 timed out.
Because Node 22 runtime/npm did not complete basic version checks, npm install and Wrangler install/whoami were not attempted in the Node 22 environment.
recommendedFallbacks: Use a clean container with Node 22 to run Wrangler preflight.
Use a clean macOS user environment with Node 22 installed via nvm.
Use GitHub Actions Cloudflare Pages deploy.
Use Cloudflare Dashboard manual Pages preview deploy.
